variables.name: air
variables.description: Breathing-gas reserve, in fifths; 0 is empty.

variables.name: has_rebreather
variables.description: Whether the spare closed-circuit rebreather is rigged.

variables.name: has_keycard
variables.description: Whether the reactor-core keycard has been recovered.

variables.name: has_signal
variables.description: Whether the transmitter core has been secured.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=250 beats='A lone salvage diver on a night boat over a sunken research station; a distress signal still repeats from below; establish the diver, the descent, and that air is finite'>>

choices.label: Plunge straight down the access shaft.
Descend past the external equipment locker.
Hover and study the signal's pattern first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='The diver reads the repeating signal and recognizes a deliberate human pattern, not an automated beacon; unease that someone may still be down there; air not yet spent'>>

choices.label: Descend into the flooded corridor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='The external dive locker holds a spare closed-circuit rebreather; taking it adds weight but a second chance at air; the diver weighs caution against speed'>>

choices.label: Rig the spare rebreather to your harness.
Leave it; travel light and fast.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=250 beats='Bottleneck: a flooded central junction; doorways to the laboratory wing, the crew quarters, and a half-collapsed mess hall; the core lies deeper, still sealed'>>

choices.label: Swim into the laboratory wing.
Swim into the crew quarters.
Pick through the collapsed mess hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=250 beats='The lab; a dead terminal still holds the reactor-core keycard; sample racks tempt; a strained bulkhead groans overhead, a real hazard'>>

choices.label: Pry the keycard from the dead terminal.
Search the sealed sample racks first.
Brace against the groaning bulkhead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='Deeper in the lab; a maintenance hatch leads on toward the central junction; a specimen vault tempts the diver to stay and document'>>

choices.label: Take the maintenance hatch toward the junction.
Stay to document the specimen vault.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=250 beats='Crew quarters; final logs hint at what drowned the station; an emergency O2 cylinder can refill air; a sealed drysuit bay offers a backup rebreather'>>

choices.label: Read the crew's final logs.
Crack an emergency oxygen cylinder.
Force the sealed drysuit bay.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='A flooded passage from the quarters toward the junction; a jammed door could trap the diver if forced wrong; air costs to push through'>>

choices.label: Work the flooded passage to the junction.
Force the jammed door open hard.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='The collapsed mess hall; an air pocket trapped against the ceiling can be tapped; either way a side vent leads to the junction'>>

choices.label: Tap the trapped ceiling air pocket.
Slip through the side vent to the junction.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='The drysuit bay holds a serviceable rebreather rig; clipping it on is the diver second chance at a safe ascent; a hatch leads to the junction'>>

choices.label: Rig the rebreather and head for the junction.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=250 beats='Bottleneck: a pressure door to the reactor core needs the keycard; a collapsed vent crawl is the only other way down; the diver can also lose nerve and turn back'>>

choices.label: Badge through the pressure door.
Squeeze into the collapsed vent crawl.
Lose your nerve and ascend now.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=250 beats='The vent crawl is tight, lightless, and airless; it can drop the diver into the core chamber from behind, wedge them, or be backed out of to abort'>>

choices.label: Drop into the core chamber from the vent.
Back out and abort the dive.
Force through the narrowest bend.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=240 beats='The pressure door cycles open onto the reactor core chamber; the signal is loud here; the diver crosses the threshold'>>

choices.label: Enter the core chamber.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=250 beats='Bottleneck climax: the signal source is a sealed transmitter still pinging; air is precious (reference current air); grabbing it needs breath, the rebreather lets the diver work calm, or they can flee, overload the core, or be hypnotized listening'>>

choices.label: Pull the transmitter core free now.
Switch to the rebreather and work calmly.
Abandon the signal and flee for the surface.
Trigger the failing reactor to surface it whole.
Stop and listen to the full message.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=250 beats='The transmitter core is secured (has_signal true); a data core tempts the diver to linger; the long ascent waits and air may be low (reference air)'>>

choices.label: Begin the long ascent with the prize.
Stay to wrench the data core loose too.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=250 beats='Bottleneck: the long swim up; whether the diver can power up (air high), ride the rebreather, or only claw upward on the last breath depends on their state; giving up means sinking'>>

choices.label: Power for the surface in one push.
Ride the rebreather up in safe stages.
Claw upward on your last breath.
Let go and sink back down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=250 beats='Just below the surface the diver vision tunnels; with any breath left they find one kick, with the rebreather a buddy reaches them, otherwise they slip under (reference air at zero)'>>

choices.label: Find one last kick.
Signal your dive buddy with the rebreather alarm.
Slip into the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=240 beats='The diver breaks the surface alive; the ending turns on whether the transmitter was secured (has_signal); deliver the recovered signal, or climb aboard empty-handed'>>

choices.label: Hand over the recovered signal core.
Climb aboard with nothing but your life.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=210 beats='The recovered transmitter reveals the lost message and vindicates the dive; the diver delivers it; the main triumphant, series-advancing ending'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Alive but empty-handed; the signal still pings below; a hollow, survivable failure that invites another attempt'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Backing out of the vent, the diver aborts and surfaces alive; the station keeps its secret; a measured, non-lethal failure that respects the choice to live'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='The dive buddy hauls the diver onto the boat at the edge of blackout; rescued, shaken, mission unfinished; a survivable failure'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Out of air below the surface, the diver slips into the dark; a lethal ending, somber and unflinching but not gratuitous (16+ permits death)'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Letting go, the diver sinks back toward the station; a quiet, lethal surrender ending (16+ permits death)'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='The strained bulkhead gives way and the lab implodes; a sudden lethal ending; tense but not gory (16+ permits death)'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Lost in documenting the specimen vault, the diver lets the window close and surfaces with science but no signal; a neutral, non-lethal ending'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Forcing the jammed door seals the diver in the quarters; rescue eventually comes, the dive a failure; survivable, non-lethal'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Nerve gone, the diver ascends from the junction; alive, the core unreached; a survivable failure of will'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Forcing the narrowest bend wedges the diver in the lightless vent as air runs out; a lethal ending; claustrophobic, restrained (16+ permits death)'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Triggering the failing reactor surfaces the wreck but not the diver; a lethal, sacrificial ending (16+ permits death)'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Lingering to wrench the data core free, the diver runs out of air at the worst moment; a lethal ending born of greed (16+ permits death)'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=200 beats='Transfixed by the full message, the diver loses track of air and time; a lethal, eerie ending (16+ permits death)'>>
